OPENCTI_URL.description: The URL of the OpenCTI platform.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The default admin token set in the OpenCTI platform.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: Comma-separated list of supported MIME types.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: Determines the verbosity of the logs. Options are debug, info, warn, or error.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Enable/disable automatic import of files matching the scope.

CONNECTOR_VALIDATE_BEFORE_IMPORT.description: If enabled, bundles are sent for validation before import.

CONNECTOR_XTM_ONE_INTENT.description: Intent used by XTM One to bind this connector to specific AI agents.

IMPORT_DOCUMENT_AI_API_BASE_URL.description: [DEPRECATED] The URL of the Ariane extraction service running the AI model.

IMPORT_DOCUMENT_AI_API_KEY.description: [DEPRECATED] The Enterprise Edition license certificate in PEM format.

IMPORT_DOCUMENT_AI_CREATE_INDICATOR.description: If true, creates an Indicator for each extracted observable.

IMPORT_DOCUMENT_AI_INCLUDE_RELATIONSHIPS.description: If false, removes all ML-predicted relationships from the imported bundle.
